title: neotinea lactea subsp. conica
intro: Neotinea lactea subsp. conica, also known as the conical bee orchid, is a subspecies of orchid native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of flavonoids and terpenoids, which possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits associated with Neotinea lactea subsp. conica include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, reduce fever, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various ailments. Neotinea lactea subsp. conica can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a medical professional due to limited scientific research on its safety and efficacy.
